
Abundances
==========

.. automodule:: gastronomy.abundances
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

Minerals
========

.. autoclass:: gastronomy.minerals.Mineral

VY1995
======

This module hosts functions that utilize the
`Verner & Yakovlev (1995) <https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/1995A%26AS..109..125V/abstract>`_
X-ray absorption cross section tables.

.. autofunction:: gastronomy.VY1995.compute_xsect
.. autofunction:: gastronomy.VY1995.mineral_abs_xsect
